$description: Content tokens. Keys are semantic, never descriptive. See /skills/copy.md.

home.headline: Design in code. Ship from day one.
home.body: This starter follows the playbook: codebase is the design system, skill files persist context, and designers ship via PRs. Open the canvas to see flows, the design system to see live tokens.

welcome.headline: Set up your workspace in three steps.
welcome.body: We won't ask anything we don't need. You can change it all later from settings.

email.headline: What's your email?
email.body: We'll send you a sign-in code. No password to remember.
email.label: Email address

errors.required: Enter the email address you want to sign in with.
errors.format: That doesn't look like an email address. Check for typos.
errors.network: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

errors.incomplete: Enter the full 6-digit code from your email.
errors.incorrect: That code didn't match. Check your email or request a new one.

ready.headline: You're ready.
ready.body: Your workspace is live. Here's what to try first.

errors.auth.expired: Your session expired. Sign in to continue.
errors.network.unreachable: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
